data.title: New research shows how AMIE, our medical AI, could help manage health conditions.
data.description: <img src="https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-uniblog-publish-prod/images/AMIE_Mx_Nature_Social_Visual_Va.max-600x600.format-webp.webp">Research in “Nature” shows our conversational AI system matches primary care physicians in complex disease management.
